name: control mapping: /legal-review-mark <framework> <control_id> --reviewer <name> --date <date> updates legal_review_status to reviewed_by:<name>:<date>
command:
printf -- "- framework: soc2-tsc
  control_id: CC8.1
  satisfied_by: [rubric_rule]
  legal_review_status: pending
" > controls.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/legal-review-mark.sh" --framework soc2-tsc --control-id CC8.1 --reviewer legal-team --date 2026-05-13 --controls-file "$PWD/controls.yaml" && grep "reviewed_by:legal-team:2026-05-13" controls.yaml 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
